KATSU: Right, the whole debacle with Per: KATSU: Right, the whole debacle with Percival and that mystery man, Horace.
Well, I can corroborate Percival's accou: Well, I can corroborate Percival's account. What he said in that tape wasn't a lie.

And Percival did go AWOL at a certain po: And Percival did go AWOL at a certain point.

KATSU: Well, when the world was going th: KATSU: Well, when the world was going through some rough times, I waited for my daughter to return to Rejuv Co.
But it became too dangerous, and one of: But it became too dangerous, and one of my co-workers dragged me into our safety bunker.
But due to all the ruckus outside, I bec: But due to all the ruckus outside, I became trapped. For a long time.
Madame X freed me and gave me a choice. Join, or die.
I died, of course. Mentally, probably ph: I died, of course. Mentally, probably physically. And now I'm here.
KATSU: Yes. I believe that for certain.
You see, Madame X isn't a real person. S: You see, Madame X isn't a real person. She's an android with a high level of machine learning capabilities.
She was designed to lose battles. So that she can become stronger through analyzing that data.
She can also become stronger by sucking: She can also become stronger by sucking up energy released by battling.
The clash between Pokémon releases energ: The clash between Pokémon releases energy that can be converted into data that can then be converted into useful battle infos.
That was the whole idea behind Blackstee: That was the whole idea behind Blacksteeple Castle.
Strong trainers and the like were brough: Strong trainers and the like were brought there for AI training, basically.

Totodile, Pikachu, Snorunt, Tepig, Litwi: Totodile, Pikachu, Snorunt, Tepig, Litwick, Falinks, Onix, Staraptor, and so on.

\\c[6]They are all capable of Mega Evolu: \c[6]They are all capable of Mega Evolution.
You're playing dumb, \\PN. You aren't du: You're playing dumb, \PN. You aren't dumb.

Have this as a reward for being so smart: Have this as a reward for being so smart.

But yes, they can all become Mega'd.

But it wasn't the answer I was looking f: But it wasn't the answer I was looking for.
And this is important because Percival's: And this is important because Percival's Jurisdiction allowed for infinite Mega Energy potential.
Percival used this power to cause those: Percival used this power to cause those Pokémon around Reldin to become Rogue Mega Evolutions.
As a trial and a safe to his secret.
Out of all the Jurisdiction crystals, hi: Out of all the Jurisdiction crystals, his is the one that remains.
Mostly because no one knows where it is.
He hid it specifically as he went off to: He hid it specifically as he went off to confront Madame X.
Now why would he go out of the way to do: Now why would he go out of the way to do this? To be a nuisance?
I'm sure that's half the answer, but I f: I'm sure that's half the answer, but I feel something deeper going on.
That shade of him, Percival...\\nHe aske: That shade of him, Percival...\nHe asked you specifically to confirm his status.
I get idle curiosity of your own fate, b: I get idle curiosity of your own fate, but a shade cannot care about this.
If you were to talk to him <i>again</i>,: If you were to talk to him again, he won't even remember the conversation you had with him before.
And that's because he is a snapshot. A s: And that's because he is a snapshot. A single frame captured in time.
A frame that is on repeat.
So what is the common denominator here?: So what is the common denominator here?
The sunglasses. The \"proof\". The physi: The sunglasses. The "proof". The physical object.
It has nothing to do with confirming any: It has nothing to do with confirming anything. He wants the "proof" to exist in the same room as him.

And that is what makes this dangerous.
So here is what we are going to do.
You are going to leave those shades here: You are going to leave those shades here.
And you are going to go back to Percival: And you are going to go back to Percival's shade and ask him why he needs this.
Two, he refrains. Major red flag. I'm ta: Two, he refrains. Major red flag. I'm talking Magcargo red.
Either scenario, you are going to attemp: Either scenario, you are going to attempt to destroy the crystal in front of him.
If it's confusion, it's suspicious at wo: If it's confusion, it's suspicious at worst.
But if it's fear and rage...
THAT tells you everything you need to kn: THAT tells you everything you need to know.
So come on, hand them over.
Won't keep you here any longer.
The glasses being with me does not mean: The glasses being with me does not mean they are safe.
There's an angry Celebi running around,: There's an angry Celebi running around, and if push comes to shove it might come after me for those glasses.
I'll do my best to fight it off, but I'm: I'll do my best to fight it off, but I'm an old bag.
Now be a good boy and get out of my offi: Now be a good boy and get out of my office.
Now be a good girl and get out of my off: Now be a good girl and get out of my office.
Now be a good little Interceptor and get: Now be a good little Interceptor and get out of my office.

Why did Pribi appear so suddenly?: Why did Pribi appear so suddenly?
Even if I am here, how have I taken a co: Even if I am here, how have I taken a corporeal form?
This just does not sit right with me...\: This just does not sit right with me...\nThere must be something else at play here.
What am I to do with myself now? With al: What am I to do with myself now? With all this time...?
Am I expected to build a life here?: Am I expected to build a life here?
I shall dedicate my life to finding a wa: I shall dedicate my life to finding a way back home to Marcia and my two boys.
\\c[6]Before I left, we had a little gir: \c[6]Before I left, we had a little girl on the way.
I refuse to let my daughter live a life: I refuse to let my daughter live a life without her father.
SABINE: So, I guess that's it...
Even after all that I still feel sore ab: Even after all that I still feel sore about Percival.
I'm very grateful for a second chance at: I'm very grateful for a second chance at life, but at the same time I wish I made it around on my first...
What does life look like for me after th: What does life look like for me after this? I don't even know. I'm scared.
I've suddenly found myself in the care o: I've suddenly found myself in the care of many Pokémon.
Mind helping me out by taking care of th: Mind helping me out by taking care of this little guy for me?

They're going to do whatever the hell I: They're going to do whatever the hell I want them to.
A better question would be... \"How did: A better question would be... "How did you save all these people??"...
The saving part is actually quite easy.
See, every Xen member is just a projecti: See, every Xen member is just a projection. Their body is physical, but they tear apart real easily with damage.
All of their souls were inside The Heart: All of their souls were inside The Hearth.
The hard part was finding their soul, ex: The hard part was finding their soul, extracting it, and combining it with their host...
I think we started being seen a long tim: I think we started being seen a long time ago. I just don't think Vitus cared.
Or maybe... I was too important at the t: Or maybe... I was too important at the time for him to do anything about it.
Regardless, I couldn't do it too much or: Regardless, I couldn't do it too much or else obviously things would get dicey.
So I mostly lent those services with peo: So I mostly lent those services with people who did administrative work here in the HQ.
Field grunts-- The ones you mostly messe: Field grunts-- The ones you mostly messed with weren't so lucky.
I wish there was something I could do, b: I wish there was something I could do, but if I took away Madame X's firepower, I would be in a lotta shit.

I did deduce some juicy information abou: I did deduce some juicy information about Horace through his own deductions and descriptions about where he woke up.
He woke up on some cove not far from Fou: He woke up on some cove not far from Four Island in Kanto.
He met Celebi in a small forest there, a: He met Celebi in a small forest there, and then they were off to destroy as many of those capsules as they could find.
Obviously a test to build strength, but: Obviously a test to build strength, but Horace got a little too cocky.
As for Sabine, she's in no different pos: As for Sabine, she's in no different position from any of her other friends here.
When work shows up, she'll be called, an: When work shows up, she'll be called, and then she'll be paid.
No one is forced to stay. If you wanna l: No one is forced to stay. If you wanna leave now, you can.
It seems most want to stay here, though. Can you blame 'em?
A lot of them were killed before Aevium: A lot of them were killed before Aevium was even torn apart!
KATSU: Old Percy... Hmph.\\nI did speak: KATSU: Old Percy... Hmph.\nI did speak with him a few times.
Always cordial, but it's just a front as: Always cordial, but it's just a front as you could probably guess.
Did some research on him, though.
There WAS mention of a lot of missing pe: There WAS mention of a lot of missing people during the time he was in East Gearen.
But because of all the hub-bub, it was q: But because of all the hub-bub, it was quickly swept under the rug.
Unfortunately, it seems like the number: Unfortunately, it seems like the number of people he actually murdered was pretty high...
I bet a few dozen, yes, dozen, of those: I bet a few dozen, yes, dozen, of those ended up being Xen Grunts just like Sabine.
You wanna know a theory of mine?: You wanna know a theory of mine?
KATSU: Yes you do. Don't lie to me.
Anyways, when he was "blessed" by Mt. Ruin, or whatever...
I think what really happened is that whe: I think what really happened is that when a piece of Melmetal was used to replace his missing arm...
It unfortunately introduced him a bit to: It unfortunately introduced him a bit to the Melmetal's hivemind, and thus gave him an "instinct" to serve Mt. Ruin.
See, Meltan and Melmetal throw junk into: See, Meltan and Melmetal throw junk into the pit of magma below to fuel Mt. Ruin, allegedly.
I think Percival started doing the same,: I think Percival started doing the same, but eventually decided random junk wasn't enough.
Probably started with Pokémon, and then: Probably started with Pokémon, and then made his way to people.
If he never made contact with that mount: If he never made contact with that mountain, I think he'd be like any other average Joe on the street.
But he did make contact with it, and he: But he did make contact with it, and he became a problem.
And problems are always meant to be deal: And problems are always meant to be dealt with...
KATSU: If you haven't noticed, there's q: KATSU: If you haven't noticed, there's quite a few Nihilego left behind by Storm-Nym's onslaught.
You should catch them if you can. They a: You should catch them if you can. They are a danger to society.
You won't get a reward from me for doing: You won't get a reward from me for doing so. You're supposed to be a good person.
Also, if it wasn't clear, it's not the N: Also, if it wasn't clear, it's not the Nihilego's fault for being dangerous.
If I was yanked from my own world into a: If I was yanked from my own world into another one like that, I'd kill people too.
Nothing personal or anything, but I'm pi: Nothing personal or anything, but I'm pissed!!
They're really hard to catch with normal: They're really hard to catch with normal hardware. We sell Beast Balls down at the Center.
And because I <i>want</i> to, bitch.\\nD: And because I want to, bitch.\nDo you have a problem with Madame Gangsta?

I like to dress up and have fun.\\nLast: I like to dress up and have fun.\nLast I checked, that ain't a crime.

Being judgmental on Reldin Island is, so I'd be a good little girl and be respectful.
Being judgmental on Reldin Island is, so I'd be good and respectful if I were you.

Here Sabine and I are when suddenly ther: Here Sabine and I are when suddenly there's a commotion about the end of the world?
